name: What Matters for Simulation to Online Reinforcement Learning on Real Robots
summary: arXiv:2602.20220v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We investigate what specific design choices enable successful online reinforcement learning (RL) on physical robots. Across 100 real-world...
description: arXiv:2602.20220v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We investigate what specific design choices enable successful online reinforcement learning (RL) on physical robots. Across 100 real-world training runs on three distinct robotic platforms, we systematically ablate algorithmic, systems, and experimental decisions that are typically left implicit in prior work. We find that some widely us...
author: Yarden As, Dhruva Tirumala, Ren\'e Zurbr\"ugg, Chenhao Li, Stelian Coros, Andreas Krause, Markus Wulfmeier
